description: Persistent issue tracker. Decider appends new issues from Curmudgeon reviews, marks resolved when wins.json no longer contains the flagged text.

issues.title: WIN-006 c6 minor: duplicated post-hoc paragraph across WIN-006/007/022/036 NP.xy cluster
issues.description: Each of WIN-006, WIN-007, WIN-022, WIN-036 replicates ~600 chars of post-hoc boilerplate for the NOAA NP.xy dataset. TF-IDF dilution, reduces signal. Recommendation: hoist shared paragraph to Part 3.1b once and replace per-WIN copies with 1-sentence reference. Structural change touching 4 WINs — route to analyst for bundle with NP.xy cluster expansion.
issues.routing_reason: Structural change touching WIN-006/007/022/036 — hoist post-hoc paragraph to Part 3.1b. Bundle with NP.xy cluster expansion.
